_comment: SYNTHETIC sample display-name aliases (Marvin 1.5). Maps the full legal firm name carried in the bid matrix to the short name shown on the board scorecard. Keys match on the normalized raw/display name (firm-suffix drift tolerated); the raw matrix name is ALWAYS retained in the run log for audit. A dotted acronym like 'C.R.E.S.T' -> CREST is handled by display_name normalization, so it is NOT listed here. All firms are fictional. Pass with --aliases examples/sample_aliases.json.
